summary: The diff successfully implements REQ-7 by replacing the Parwati Dairy logo throughout the application. The new logo (parwati-dairy-logo.dim_800x800.png) is displayed in the Layout header component and the Home page hero section with proper aspect ratio and mobile-responsive sizing using Tailwind classes. The implementation maintains the existing warm dairy-themed color scheme as evidenced by the unchanged color palette in frontend-file-summaries.txt.
